title: Mining in the Courts Vol IX – March 2019
content:
## Mining in the Courts Vol IX – March 2019

### Mining in the Courts Vol IX
This ninth edition provides summaries of important Canadian court cases from the past year that may impact businesses and commentary on issues of interest to the mining sector.
